subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God and God of Names, my Creator and Creator of the heavens! I beseech Thee by the Name through which were subdued [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا الهی و اله الاسماء و فاطری و فاطر السماء اسئلک بالاسم الذی به خضعت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
